heading: Congressional notification of intelligence collection adjustments
label: 3620 Congressional notification of intelligence collection adjustments
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). , substituted “that a covered intelligence collection or sharing adjustment has occurred” for “the occurrence of an intelligence collection adjustment” and “summary of such adjustment and the cause of such adjustment” for “notification of the intelligence collection adjustment”.Pub. L. 119–60, § 6802(1)Subsec. (b)(2). , amended par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The term ‘intelligence collection adjustment’ includes a change by the United States Government to a policy on intelligence collection or the prioritization thereof that results in a significant loss of intelligence.”Pub. L. 119–60, § 6802(2)
amendments: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). , substituted “that a covered intelligence collection or sharing adjustment has occurred” for “the occurrence of an intelligence collection adjustment” and “summary of such adjustment and the cause of such adjustment” for “notification of the intelligence collection adjustment”.Pub. L. 119–60, § 6802(1)Subsec. (b)(2). , amended par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The term ‘intelligence collection adjustment’ includes a change by the United States Government to a policy on intelligence collection or the prioritization thereof that results in a significant loss of intelligence.”Pub. L. 119–60, § 6802(2)

children.heading: Notification
children.label: a Notification
children.text: Not later than 30 days after the date on which the Director of the National Security Agency determines that a covered intelligence collection or sharing adjustment has occurred, the Director shall submit to the congressional intelligence committees, the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate, and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives a summary of such adjustment and the cause of such adjustment.

children.heading: Congressional intelligence committees
children.label: 1 Congressional intelligence committees
children.text: The term “congressional intelligence committees” has the meaning given that term in .section 3003 of this title

children.heading: Covered intelligence collection or sharing adjustment
children.label: 2 Covered intelligence collection or sharing adjustment
A
children.text: the quantity of intelligence collected by the National Security Agency with respect to a foreign country, foreign organization, or senior leader of a foreign country or foreign organization; or

children.label: B
children.text: policies or practices of the National Security Agency with respect to the sharing of intelligence with a foreign country, organization of foreign countries, or organization of countries of which the United States is a member.
